# Jose A. Sanchez Viloria

> Jose Sanchez Viloria is a wireless systems researcher, computer engineer, and Ph.D. candidate specializing in AI-assisted secure communications, 5G, software-defined radio, RF machine learning, physical-layer security, and large-scale wireless testbeds.

## Primary pages

- [Professional profile](https://joseasanvil.com/): Research, experience, projects, publications, technical skills, and contact information.
- [HTML resume](https://joseasanvil.com/resume.html): Crawlable professional experience, education, publications, projects, awards, languages, and technical skills.
- [PDF resume](https://joseasanvil.com/Resume/Resume_Full.pdf): Downloadable full resume.

## Expertise

- AI-assisted secure wireless communications
- 5G and 5G NR
- Software-defined radio, GNU Radio, USRP, and PySDR
- RF machine learning and automatic modulation classification
- Physical-layer key generation and authentication
- OpenAirInterface, O-RAN, NVIDIA Aerial, and Sionna
- CAAI SDR and 5G testbeds
- PAWR large- and city-scale wireless deployments
- Embedded systems, IoT, robotics, and distributed systems
- Python, C++, C, Java, MATLAB, SQL, Docker, and AWS

## Experience

- Graduate Research Assistant, Center for Connected Autonomy and Artificial Intelligence at Florida Atlantic University
- Wireless Software Engineer Intern, Apple
- Software Development Engineer Co-Op, Amazon Robotics
- Research Assistant, Lab in a Window
- Systems Administrator, Latin American and Caribbean Consortium of Engineering Institutions

## Education

- Ph.D. candidate in Computer Engineering, Florida Atlantic University
- M.S. in Computer Engineering, Florida Atlantic University
- B.S. in Computer Engineering, Florida Atlantic University
